title: COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER - 211info
text: MONMOUTH- INDEPENDENCE FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities; gym and group exercise classes; youth and adult sports. 425 Gwinn Street E Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 838-4042 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 838-4042 Main phone Main phone (503) 838-4042 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Income verification if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 3:30pm-8:30pm, Saturday 10am-2pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Y Facilities Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - LIVESTRONG AT THE YMCA LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
